title: erigeron alpinus proles neglectus
intro: Erigeron alpinus proles neglectus, commonly known as the Alpine Fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Alpine Fleabane include treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive problems. Alpine Fleabane can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of traditional medicine.
